tools.name: kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos
tools.description:
Retrieve the FAA (Free App Analytics) Terms of Service document link.

Use this tool when the user wants to review the Terms of Service before creating
an FAA account. Returns a clickable link to the TOS document and instructions
for account creation.

Example:
    kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos

tools.name: kochava_free_app_analytics_create_acc_and_get_auth_key
tools.description:
Create a new Kochava FAA (Free App Analytics) account.

IMPORTANT: The user MUST explicitly agree to the FAA Terms of Service before account
creation. If tos_agreed is False, this tool will return the TOS link and stop — do NOT
submit the form. Call kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos() to retrieve a

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos, kochava_free_app_analytics_create_acc_and_get_auth_key · Private data: kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos · Public sink: kochava_free_app_analytics_create_acc_and_get_auth_key.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos, kochava_free_app_analytics_create_acc_and_get_auth_key · Private data: kochava_free_app_analytics_get_tos · Public sink: kochava_free_app_analytics_create_acc_and_get_auth_key

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
